title: Keybinds Galore
description: Adds a popup menu when a conflicting keybind is pressed.
body: # Keybinds Galore A Fabric mod that adds a popup menu when a conflicting keybind is pressed. # How to use it You just install the mod and that's it! No more worrying about conflicting keybinds. # Other Information For bug reporting please proceed to the mod's GitHub repository: https://github.com/CaelTheColher/KeybindsGalore #
